verses.gurmukhi: ਹਮਰੀ ਕਰੋ ਹਾਥ ਦੈ ਰੱਛਾ ॥ ਪੂਰਨ ਹੋਇ ਚਿੱਤ ਕੀ ਇੱਛਾ ॥
verses.hindi: हमरी करो हाथ दै रछा ॥ पूरन होइ चित की इछा ॥
verses.english: Protect us with Your Hand. May the desires of our minds be fulfilled.
verses.translation: Protect us with Your hand. May the desires of our minds be fulfilled.

verses.gurmukhi: ਤਵ ਚਰਨਨ ਮਨ ਰਹੈ ਹਮਾਰਾ ॥ ਅਪਨਾ ਜਾਨਹੁ ਦਾਸ ਤੁਮਾਰਾ ॥
verses.hindi: तव चरनन मन रहै हमारा ॥ अपना जानहु दास तुमारा ॥
verses.english: May my mind dwell at Your feet. Know me as Your servant.
verses.translation: May our minds remain at Your feet. Please consider us Your own servants.

verses.gurmukhi: ਅਪਨੀ ਭਗਤਿ ਤੋਹਿ ਹਮ ਦੇਹੁ ॥ ਦੂਜੀ ਭਗਤਿ ਨ ਮਨ ਮੋ ਲੇਹੁ ॥
verses.hindi: अपनी भगति तोहि हम देहु ॥ दूजी भगति न मन मो लेहु ॥
verses.english: Grant us devotion to You. Let no other devotion enter our minds.
verses.translation: Grant us devotion to You alone. Let no other devotion enter our minds.

verses.gurmukhi: ਜਬ ਲਗ ਜੀਉ ਘਟ ਮਹਿ ਰਹਨਾ ॥ ਤਬ ਲਗ ਨਾਮੁ ਰਿਦੇ ਮਹਿ ਕਹਨਾ ॥
verses.hindi: जब लग जीउ घट महि रहना ॥ तब लग नामु रिदे महि कहना ॥
verses.english: As long as this soul dwells in this body, let me chant Your Name in my heart.
verses.translation: As long as the soul dwells within, let the Name dwell in the heart.

verses.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਸਹਾਈ ਸਦਾ ਸੰਗਿ ॥ ਸਾਧਸੰਗਤਿ ਊਬਰੇ ਸਭਿ ਰੰਗਿ ॥
verses.hindi: सतिगुरु सहाई सदा संगि ॥ साधसंगति ऊबरे सभि रंगि ॥
verses.english: The True Guru is the helper, ever with us. In the holy congregation, all are saved through all colors.
verses.translation: The True Guru is always the helper and companion. Through the holy congregation, all are saved.
